# External raw data not bundled in this repository

Large public raw datasets are not committed here. Download them from the sources listed in the manuscript KEY RESOURCES TABLE before rerunning scripts:

- UCSC Xena: `TcgaTargetGtex_rsem_gene_tpm` / `TcgaTargetGTEX_phenotype.txt`
- Aran et al. tumor purity table: `41467_2015_BFncomms9971_MOESM1236_ESM.xlsx`
- DepMap Public 26Q1: `OmicsExpressionTPMLogp1HumanProteinCodingGenes.csv`, `CRISPRGeneEffect.csv`, `Model.csv`
- ENCODE TF ChIP-seq and ATAC-seq peak files; file accessions are listed in Supplementary Tables S6 and S6B
- GENCODE Human Release 49: `gencode.v49.basic.annotation.gtf`
- GEO GSE214231: speedingCAR single-cell raw matrices and barcode assignment files
- GEO GSE249511: NKG2D-based adaptor CAR T-cell bulk RNA-seq Salmon `quant.sf.gz` files

Derived tables and generated figures recovered from the uploaded archive are stored under `analyses/` and cross-referenced in `Supplementary_Table_Map.csv`.
